hooks.command:
bash -c 'printf "
  ● session started

"; cat CURRENT.md 2>/dev/null || printf "  (no CURRENT.md found)
"; EXPECTED=$(grep -m1 "^active_branch:" CURRENT.md 2>/dev/null | sed "s/active_branch: *//"); ACTUAL=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$EXPECTED" ] && [ -n "$ACTUAL" ] && [ "$EXPECTED" != "$ACTUAL" ]; then printf "
  ⚠ BRANCH MISMATCH: expected "%s" but on "%s"

" "$EXPECTED" "$ACTUAL"; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}"; [[ -z "$FILE" ]] && exit 0; echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx|cjs|mjs)$" || exit 0; echo "$FILE" | grep -q "node_modules" && exit 0; RESULT=$(npx eslint "$FILE" 2>&1); CODE=$?; [[ $CODE -eq 0 ]] && exit 0; printf "
  ✗ Lint failed in %s:
%s
  → Fix before committing
" "$FILE" "$RESULT"; exit 2'
